creator: tom.hurst@clara.net
text:
* Miguel Mendez (flynn@energyhq.homeip.net) wrote:

> >Synopsis:       lang/perl5 is un-fetchable

It gets there eventually:

>> Attempting to fetch from http://www.dnsbalance.ring.gr.jp/archives/lang/perl/CPAN/modules/by-module/../../src/.
fetch: BSDPAN-5.6.1.tar.gz: Not Found
>> Attempting to fetch from http://cpan.shellhung.org/modules/by-module/../../src/.
fetch: BSDPAN-5.6.1.tar.gz: Not Found
>> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.mirror.ac.uk/sites/ftp.funet.fi/pub/languages/perl/CPAN/modules/by-module/../../src/.
fetch: BSDPAN-5.6.1.tar.gz: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
>> Attempting to fetch from ftp://sunsite.org.uk/packages/perl/CPAN/modules/by-module/../../src/.
fetch: BSDPAN-5.6.1.tar.gz: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
>> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/local-distfiles/tobez/.
Receiving BSDPAN-5.6.1.tar.gz (6345 bytes): 100%
6345 bytes transferred in 0.1 seconds (79.68 kBps)

Not that this is an excuse for it to be unfetchable on the 30 sites it
tries before suceeding :)
